title: astragalus isabellae
intro: Astragalus isabellae is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus isabellae include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Astragalus isabellae are commonly available as capsules, tablets, or teas, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
